# holistics_dashboard (Data Source)

Look up a Holistics dashboard by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "holistics_dashboard" "kpi" {
  id = 1234
}

output "dashboard_url" {
  value = data.holistics_dashboard.kpi.url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `category_id` (Number)
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `owner_id` (Number)
- `tags` (List of String)
- `title` (String)
- `url` (String)
- `version` (Number)
